snf_admission_skilled_level.label: Daily skilled nursing need
snf_admission_skilled_level.description: Evidence that nursing interventions require skilled personnel and daily monitoring.

snf_admission_skilled_level.label: Skilled therapy need
snf_admission_skilled_level.description: Evidence of PT/OT/SLP need that cannot be safely delivered at a lower level.

snf_admission_skilled_level.label: Lower level unsafe or inadequate
snf_admission_skilled_level.description: Evidence that home/lower-level care would not meet patient needs safely.

snf_continued_stay_custodial.label: Ongoing skilled need
snf_continued_stay_custodial.description: Evidence that services are skilled, not merely custodial.

snf_continued_stay_custodial.label: Therapy progress or skilled maintenance
snf_continued_stay_custodial.description: Evidence of measurable progress, skilled therapy need, or clinically justified continued services.

irf_lower_level.label: Multidisciplinary rehab need
irf_lower_level.description: Evidence that patient requires coordinated intensive rehabilitation disciplines.

irf_lower_level.label: Physician oversight need
irf_lower_level.description: Evidence that medical complexity requires IRF-level physician management.
